definition: Grade-based entry model with confluence scoring table. Each layer contributes points; total score determines trade grade and risk allocation.
depends_on: All layers 0-5 concepts feed into grading

confluence_scoring_table._description: Each factor adds points. Total determines grade. Minimum score for live trade: 55.

grade_C.description: Paper trade only unless exceptional context

required_factors_gate._rule: Even if total score is high, trade is BLOCKED if any required factor is missing
required_factors_gate.missing_required_action: Downgrade to max Grade C regardless of score

grade_a_criteria.description: Score >= 80. ALL required factors met. Every layer contributing.

layer_checklist.layer_0: IPDA context known + quarterly shift direction aligned + no adverse seasonal pattern
layer_checklist.layer_1: HTF structure + dealing range + liquidity levels + session levels all clear
layer_checklist.layer_2: Correct premium/discount zone + active kill zone + PO3 aligned + daily bias confirmed
layer_checklist.layer_3: Confirmed liquidity sweep + displacement + CISD or CHoCH + optional SMT
layer_checklist.layer_4: Valid OB + FVG at entry zone, preferably stacked
layer_checklist.layer_5: Entry at OTE within OB/FVG. DOL target >= 2R.

grade_b_criteria.description: Score 55-79. All required factors met. Missing 1-2 elements from layers 2-5.
common_gaps: FVG but no OB overlap (layer 4, -4 pts)

grade_c_criteria.description: Score 35-54. Layer 1 satisfied but layers 3-5 incomplete, OR missing a required factor.

grade_d_skip.description: Score < 35. Layer 1 NOT satisfied OR no liquidity event AND no entry zone.

bridge_integration.ict_score_field: TradeDecision.ict_score maps to this confluence scoring total
bridge_integration.grade_field: TradeDecision.grade set by Claude based on scoring table
bridge_integration.risk_pct_field: TradeDecision.risk_pct derived from grade_risk_table in risk_management.json
bridge_integration.paper_always: All grades recorded in paper shadow for audit trail
